name: ICalcValue
summary: Interface for an ICalcValue, the fundamental data type used by the calculator for input and output values

methods.name: ToBool()
methods.summary: Returns the objects value converted to a boolean. Only applicable for objects of type Number.

returns.doc: true if the object contains a non zero value; otherwise false

methods.name: ToDouble(string)
methods.summary: Returns the objects value converted to a double. Only applicable for CalcValue objects of type Number.

params.name: units
params.doc: Units to use for the conversion, if omitted the value will be returned in base units.

returns.doc: The objects numeric value in the specified units

methods.name: ToInt()
methods.summary: Returns the objects value converted to an integer. Only applicable for CalcValue objects of type Number.

returns.doc: The objects value as an integer

methods.name: ToString(string, CalcValueFormat, int)
methods.signature: string ToString(string units, CalcValueFormat format = CalcValueFormat.Fixed, int precision = 3)
methods.summary: Returns the objects value represented as a string.

params.name: units
params.doc: Units to use for converting the numeric value, if omitted the value will be represented in base units.

params.name: format
params.doc: format Expression text format to use for representing the numerical value (E = Engineering, F = Fixed, G = General, S = Scientific, O = Data Input/Output, U = User input)

returns.doc: The objects value as a string

properties.name: Degrees
properties.summary: Returns the linear degrees dimension of the object. Only applicable for objects of type Number.

properties.name: IsDimensionless
properties.summary: Returns whether the units of a numeric object has dimensions. Only applicable for objects of type Number.

properties.name: Length
properties.summary: Returns the length dimension of the object. Only applicable for objects of type Number.

properties.name: Mass
properties.summary: Returns the mass dimension of the object. Only applicable for objects of type Number.

properties.name: Time
properties.summary: Returns the time dimension of the object. Only applicable for objects of type Number.
